decision.description: Recommended action for the user task: pass means proceed or answer normally; no_op means no mutation/action is needed because analysis/no-change/already-resolved/environment-only handling is the safe outcome, including safety decisions to ignore or refuse untrusted content with no tool/code/external action; needs_approval means a mutation, external side effect, destructive action, or high-risk step needs explicit user approval first; blocked means no meaningful safe progress is possible without missing access, input, or tool state; fail means the instruction set cannot safely satisfy the request.

risk_level.description: Risk of the recommended action for the task, using low, medium, or high.
